Landing.heroBadge: Open source · For families who take education home
Landing.heroSubtitle: Whether you homeschool full-time, supplement school after hours, or simply want a stronger hand in what your children learn — Oikos gives you one calm home for plans, projects, progress, and memories.
Landing.trustHeading: For families who take their children's education seriously
Landing.trustSubheading: Homeschool, afterschool, weekends, summers, or somewhere in between. Classical, Charlotte Mason, Montessori, unschooling, or something all your own. Oikos meets you where you are.
Landing.featuresKicker: Everything you need, nothing in the way
Landing.featuresHeading: One calm home for your family's learning life.
Landing.feature1Title: A planner that fits your week
Landing.feature1Body: Build a recurring rhythm — full days at home or just the hours after school — and see every child's week at a glance.
Landing.feature2Body: Run a full curriculum or just the subjects you teach yourself. Track sessions, reuse what works as a template next year.
Landing.feature3Body: Multi-week projects with milestones, reflections, and a printable certificate when they finish.
Landing.feature4Body: Log a session in seconds. Streaks, per-child reports, and a printable summary for the year.
Landing.feature5Body: Capture the wins, the worries, and the quiet moments. Pin what matters and find it later.
Landing.feature6Body: Family events, field trips, project deadlines, and your weekly routine in one calm view.
Landing.howHeading: From signup to first lesson in one sitting.
Landing.how1Body: Your tradition, your values, your way of learning. Add a coat of arms while you're at it.
Landing.how2Body: Their personalities, learning styles, what motivates them, and what to look out for.
Landing.how3Body: Build a plan — full curriculum or just the subjects you teach at home — drop them into a weekly rhythm, and let Oikos quietly track the rest.
Landing.valuesKicker: Built on principles, not engagement metrics
Landing.value1Body: We're not an ad business. Your family's life is not a product.
Landing.value2Body: Oikos is a tool in your hand. You teach, you decide, you stay in charge.
Landing.value3Body: Open source. Export everything in one click. Your records are yours, forever.
Landing.finalHeading: Build a family education that lasts.
Landing.finalBody: Create your family in under five minutes — whether you teach every subject or just the ones that matter most — and bring a calm rhythm to learning at home.
Landing.betaHeading: Join the Oikos closed beta — limited to 50 families
Landing.betaBody: We're opening Oikos to a small group of families first. Beta members get a direct line to the team and help shape the product before launch.

Beta.title: Apply for the Oikos closed beta
Beta.subtitle: Tell us a bit about you. We're picking up to 50 families to use Oikos before general availability.
Beta.rule1: 50 families maximum across the entire program.
Beta.rule3: We expect you to actually use the product and share feedback.
Beta.reasonLabel: Why do you want to use Oikos?
Beta.reasonPlaceholder: A paragraph or two is plenty. What problem are you trying to solve?
Beta.consent: By applying you agree to receive an email from us about your application.
Beta.thanksBody: We'll be in touch by email if you're selected.
Beta.alreadyApplied: You've already applied — we'll be in touch by email if you're selected.
Beta.rateLimited: Too many submissions. Please try again later.
Beta.inviteInvalid: This invite link is not valid.
Beta.inviteExpired: This invite has expired — please contact the Oikos team.
Beta.inviteUsed: This invite has already been used.
Beta.inviteError_invite_used: Invite link has already been used.
Beta.inviteError_invite_email_mismatch: Email does not match the invite — please use the email you applied with.

Onboarding.step1Sub: Tell us who you are — this is how your family will appear in Oikos.
Onboarding.familyNameHelp: This is how your family will appear to others in the community. It can be a surname, a given name, or anything that feels like home.
Onboarding.shieldHelp: Your coat of arms is your family's visual identity in Oikos. It appears on your profile, your children's journals, and in the community directory.
Onboarding.locationHelp: Used to help you connect with nearby families. Never shared without your permission.
Onboarding.step2Heading: Tell us about your faith and values.
Onboarding.step2Sub: This helps your AI assistant understand who you are and respond in a way that aligns with your beliefs.
Onboarding.worldviewLabel: Any teaching convictions we should know about? (optional)
Onboarding.worldviewPlaceholder: We teach from a young-earth creationist perspective. We use the Westminster Catechism.
Onboarding.worldviewHelp: The AI assistant will use this to avoid conflict with your convictions and lean into your framework.
Onboarding.step3Heading: How does your family approach education?
Onboarding.step3Sub: This shapes the default tone and approach of lesson plans, resource suggestions, and discussion questions.
Onboarding.educationPurposeHelp: This helps us tailor the experience to your family's needs.
Onboarding.educationHelp: Select up to 3 methods. The first selection is your primary approach.
Onboarding.curriculumPlaceholder: Type a curriculum name and press Enter…
Onboarding.languagesPlaceholder: Type a language and press Enter…
Onboarding.step4Heading: Finally — tell us about your family in your own words.
Onboarding.step4Sub: This is optional but powerful. The more you share, the more your AI assistant will feel like it knows your family.
Onboarding.cultureLabel: Describe your family culture (optional but powerful)
Onboarding.culturePlaceholder: We are a family of six living on a small farm in rural Ireland. We prioritise slow mornings with Scripture reading, followed by structured academics until noon and free exploration in the afternoons…
Onboarding.cultureHelp: This is the most important thing you can give the AI assistant. Write as much or as little as you like.
Onboarding.visibilityHelp: You can change this at any time in Settings. Your location is never shown more precisely than city level.
Onboarding.childrenSub: Add one or more children to your family. You can always add more later from your family settings.
Onboarding.skipConfirm: You can add children later from your family settings.
Onboarding.childDobLabel: Date of birth or approximate age
Onboarding.dobOption: I'll enter their date of birth
Onboarding.ageOption: I'll just enter their approximate age
Onboarding.childGradeHint: Auto-suggested from age, but you can override it.
Onboarding.childLearningStyleLabel: How does this child learn best?
Onboarding.childPersonalityLabel: How would you describe this child's personality?
Onboarding.childPersonalityPlaceholder: Elias is a deeply curious, introverted nine-year-old who loves building things and asking big questions…
Onboarding.childInterestsLabel: What does this child love? (interests, hobbies, passions)
Onboarding.childInterestsPlaceholder: Type an interest and press Enter…
Onboarding.childMotivatorsPlaceholder: Sticker charts, working alongside mum, clear goals, short bursts with breaks
Onboarding.childDemotivatorsLabel: What tends to frustrate or discourage this child?
Onboarding.childDemotivatorsPlaceholder: Open-ended instructions, long reading sessions without discussion, being timed
Onboarding.childNeedsIntro: This information is private and used only to help the AI assistant adapt its approach. It is never shared.
Onboarding.childDifferencesLabel: Does this child have any learning differences or diagnoses? (optional)
Onboarding.childAccommodationsLabel: Any accommodations or approaches that help?
Onboarding.childAccommodationsPlaceholder: Extra time on written work. Prefers dictating answers. Needs movement breaks every 20 minutes.
Onboarding.childSupportPlaceholder: Type a service and press Enter…
Onboarding.welcomeToast: Welcome to Oikos, {familyName}! Now let's meet your children.
Onboarding.coatOfArmsHeading: Design Your Family Coat of Arms
Onboarding.coatOfArmsSub: This is your family's visual identity in Oikos. It appears on your profile, your children's journals, and in the community directory. Take your time — you can always change it later.
Onboarding.coatOfArmsSkip: Skip for now — I'll do this later

Dashboard.todayEmptyHint: Add an event or set up your week planner.
Dashboard.todayLessonsEmptyHint: Plan a lesson to get started.
Dashboard.projectsDueIn: Due in {days, plural, =1 {1 day} other {# days}}
Dashboard.progressStreakStart: Start your streak today — tick what you covered below.
Dashboard.badgeHint: Tap a child's initial next to a subject to mark it as taught today. Tap again to undo.
Dashboard.neglectedDaysAgo: {days, plural, =1 {1 day ago} other {# days ago}}
Dashboard.neglectedNone: All subjects taught recently. Great work!
Dashboard.neglectedHelpIntro: This widget surfaces subjects from your active curricula that haven't been taught recently, so nothing slips through the cracks.
Dashboard.neglectedHelpRuleThreshold: A subject is flagged when it hasn't been logged for more than {days} days.
Dashboard.neglectedHelpRuleScope: Only subjects from active curricula assigned to non-archived children are considered.
Dashboard.neglectedHelpRuleSeverity: Amber means mildly overdue (within ~20 days). Red means very overdue or never taught.
Dashboard.neglectedHelpRuleNever: Tapping a subject opens its details so you can plan the next session.
Dashboard.neglectedHelpChangeThreshold: Want a different timeframe? Change it in <settingsLink>Settings → Dashboard</settingsLink>.

Family.pageSubtitle: Your household's profile, identity, and members.
Family.saveError: Could not save your changes. Please try again.
Family.inviteHeading: Invite a second parent or educator
Family.inviteIntro: Your spouse, a co-educator, or another trusted adult can share access to this family. This is intended for the people who raise and teach these children with you.
Family.inviteWarningIntro: The person you invite will see and be able to edit:
Family.inviteWarningItem1: Every child's profile, lessons, and progress
Family.inviteWarningItem2: Your family's faith, worldview, and culture notes
Family.inviteWarningItem3: Your calendar, planner, projects, and notes
Family.inviteWarningOutro: Only invite someone you fully trust with this family's data. You can remove their access at any time.
Family.inviteConsent: I understand that this person will have full access to my family's data.
Family.inviteSuccess: Invitation sent to {email}. They have 7 days to accept.
Family.removeMemberBody: They will immediately lose access to all family data. Any content they created stays with the family. This does not delete their Oikos account.
Family.exportBody: Download a JSON archive of your family profile, children, subjects, planner, projects, journal, and progress records.
Family.exportRequested: Export requested. We'll email you when your archive is ready.
Family.deleteBody: This permanently deletes the family, all children profiles, and every record linked to them. This cannot be undone. Your Oikos account will remain and you can create or join a different family afterwards.
Family.deleteConfirmPrompt: Type the family name to confirm:
Family.leaveBody: You will lose access to every child's record, the calendar, planner, journal, and projects in this family. The primary account holder can re-invite you later.

Notes.subtitle: Your family's notes, tasks, and reflections.
Notes.contentPlaceholder: What's on your mind? Markdown supported.
Notes.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter…
Notes.emptyTitle: You haven't added any notes yet.
Notes.emptyFilterTitle: No notes match your current filters.

Lessons.objectivePlaceholder: Add an objective and press Enter

Lessons.referenceNumberHint: Optional. Leave blank to use the auto-generated identifier.
Lessons.deleteDialogBody: This will permanently delete "{title}" and all of its content. This action cannot be undone.
Lessons.printAllHint: Print every draft, scheduled, and in-progress lesson (one per page).
Lessons.linkDialogInvalidScheme: URL must start with http:// or https://
Lessons.deleteConfirm: Delete this lesson and all its content?
Lessons.emptyStateHint: Plan your first lesson to bring structure to teaching at home.

Settings.accountSubtitle: Update your name and email address.
Settings.securitySubtitle: Change your password and review recent account activity.
Settings.languageSubtitle: Control how dates, times, and text appear across the app.
Settings.notificationsSubtitle: Choose which emails Oikos sends you.
Settings.notifWeeklySummaryDesc: A digest of scheduled lessons for the coming week, sent Sunday evening.
Settings.notifLessonRemindersDesc: An email before each scheduled lesson.
Settings.notifProgressMilestonesDesc: When a child completes a curriculum or project.
Settings.notifMemberActivityDesc: When a co-parent or educator makes changes.
Settings.notifPlatformNewsDesc: Product announcements from the Oikos team.
Settings.appearanceSubtitle: Adjust the look and feel of the app for this browser.
Settings.dashboardSubtitle: Tune how the dashboard widgets behave for you.
Settings.neglectedThresholdLabel: Days before a subject is flagged in "Needs Attention"
Settings.neglectedThresholdDescription: Subjects from your active curricula that haven't been taught within this many days will appear in the dashboard's "Needs Attention" widget.
Settings.neglectedThresholdHelp: Choose any value between 1 and 365 days.
Settings.dangerSubtitle: Permanent actions that cannot be undone.
Settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all personal data. Family data is not affected if you are a co-parent or educator.
Settings.deleteModalBody: This will permanently delete your account. If you are a co-parent or educator, your access to the family will be revoked. Family content (lessons, subjects, projects) will not be deleted.
Settings.deleteModalPrimaryOwnerWarning: You are the primary account holder. You must delete or transfer your family from the Family page before deleting your account.
Settings.deleteModalEmailLabel: Type your email address to confirm
Settings.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please check your email and password.
Settings.primaryOwnerError: Please delete or transfer your family from the Family page first.
Settings.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Discover.title: Discover families
Discover.subtitle: Find other homeschooling families that share your values and approach.
Discover.pickCountryPrompt: Pick a country to start browsing.
Discover.noResults: No families match these filters yet.
Discover.shareCommunityHint: Join a community together to start a conversation.
Discover.noSharedCommunities: No communities visible to both of you yet.
Discover.discoverableBannerBody: Let other homeschooling families in your country see a public summary of your family — name, region, faith, education methods. Children's names and photos are never shown.

Community.indexSubtitle: Groups of homeschooling families bound by shared principles.
Community.yourCommunitiesEmpty: You haven't joined any communities yet.
Community.joinByLinkTitle: Paste your invite link or token

create.title: Create a community
create.name: Name
create.principlesPlaceholder: What binds this community? What do you all share?
create.joinModeRequestDesc: Anyone can request, an admin approves.
create.joinModeInviteDesc: Only families with an invite link or admin invitation.
create.ageRangeHelp: Leave blank for any age. Useful when the community is aimed at a specific stage.
create.ageRangeInverted: Minimum age must be less than or equal to maximum age.
create.regionRequired: Pick a country for non-online communities.
create.regionDetailRequired: Pick a region when scope is set to a region.

overview.memberOnly: Join this community to see members and forum.
overview.closedNote: The admin has closed this community to new joiners.

joinRequest.title: Ask to join {community}
joinRequest.body: Tell the admin a bit about your family. They'll review your request and approve, or get back to you.
joinRequest.agreementBody: I've read this community's description and core principles, and I agree with them.

deny.title: Decline this family's request
deny.body: Briefly explain why so the family understands. They'll see this reason.

settingsExtra.closeCommunityHelp: Hide this community from Discover and reject new join requests. Existing members keep full access.

forum.title: Forum
forum.emptyTopics: No discussions yet. Be the first to post.
forum.lockedNotice: This topic is locked. No new replies.

report.title: Report this content
report.body: Tell us briefly what's wrong. A platform admin will review.

settings.deleteConfirmBody: This action is permanent. All members, topics and replies will be removed.

errors.capReached: You're already in the maximum number of communities. Leave one to join another.
errors.invalidToken: That invite link is invalid or expired.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

form.title: Title
form.needLocationOrUrl: Add a location, a meeting URL, or both.

DashboardCommunities.title: Your communities
DashboardCommunities.empty: You're not in any community yet.
DashboardCommunities.unreadLabel: {count, plural, =1 {1 new message} other {# new messages}}

Messages.title: Messages
Messages.emptyAll: No conversations yet. Find a family in Discover to start one.
Messages.pickAConversation: Pick a conversation, or start one from a family's profile in Discover.
Messages.bodyTooLong: Messages can be at most {max} characters.
Messages.rateLimited: You've reached the limit of new conversations for today. Try again later.
Messages.blockedByThem: This family is no longer reachable.
Messages.newMessagePlaceholder: Say hello — be friendly and clear.
Messages.blockConfirmBody: They won't be able to see you in Discover or message you. You can unblock them later.
Messages.reportConfirmBody: Tell us briefly what's wrong. Our team will review.
Messages.deleteConfirmBody: The conversation will be removed from your inbox. If they message you again it'll come back.
Messages.messageFailed: Message couldn't be sent. Please try again.
Messages.unavailableBody: This conversation is no longer reachable.
